subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! It is dawn, before the rising of the sun. His honor Ḥájí Siyyid Javád, through Fu'ád, hath requested this writing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله صبح است قبل طلوع آفتاب جناب حاجی سید جواد بواسطه فواد خواهش نگارش
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
